ksa_text: Skill in implementing AI system transparency and explainability mechanisms, including model interpretability techniques, output explanation methods, and confidence communication appropriate to different user contexts and regulatory requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AI-S-019 (AI and Machine Learning) scores 0.443 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Data Platform Engineer: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.443 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support AI and Machine Learning KSA AI-S-019 as a discrete competency for Data Platform Engineer?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Data Platform Engineer market data. AI content is governance/risk/compliance, not data platform engineering. Score 0.443 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. AI content is governance/risk/compliance, not data platform engineering. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: AI content is governance/risk/compliance, not data platform engineering.
